_comment: Labeled pairs for tuning POA_DEDUP_THRESHOLD. Each pair is two item texts (title\nsummary, as embedded by vec.js) and whether they are the SAME underlying story (a cross-run duplicate). Grow this set over time from real archive/*.json + dedup-report.json decisions, then run: node vec.js eval eval/dedup-labels.sample.json

pairs.a:
Anthropic ships Claude Fable 5 & Mythos 5 — then they vanish
Anthropic released two new frontier models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, on Jun 9. Days later the models were pulled from all customers under a US export-control directive.
pairs.b:
Anthropic's new Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models pulled days after launch
The two frontier models Anthropic launched on June 9 were withdrawn from every customer within days, citing a US export-control order.

pairs._note: follow-up coverage of the same event → DUP
pairs.a:
Anthropic walks back invisible safeguards; then the US bans the models outright
After quietly adding safeguards to Fable 5 and Mythos 5, Anthropic reversed course; the US then banned the models entirely.
pairs.b:
US government bans Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 after safeguard reversal
The US has prohibited Anthropic's two newest models outright, days after the company rolled back invisibly-added safeguards.

pairs.a:
Google releases DiffusionGemma — an open-weight diffusion text model
Google published DiffusionGemma, an open-weight text model that generates with a diffusion process instead of left-to-right decoding.
pairs.b:
DiffusionGemma: Google's first open-weight diffusion-based language model
Google has open-sourced DiffusionGemma, applying diffusion rather than autoregressive decoding to text generation.

pairs._note: two genuinely different AI stories → NOT dup
pairs.a:
Google releases DiffusionGemma — an open-weight diffusion text model
Google published DiffusionGemma, an open-weight text model that generates with a diffusion process instead of left-to-right decoding.
pairs.b:
OpenAI ships GPT-Realtime-2: GPT-5-class reasoning in the voice API
OpenAI released GPT-Realtime-2, bringing GPT-5-class reasoning to its low-latency voice API.

pairs._note: both about Anthropic models but different events → NOT dup
pairs.a:
Anthropic ships Claude Fable 5 & Mythos 5 — then they vanish
Anthropic released two new frontier models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, on Jun 9.
pairs.b:
OpenAI ships GPT-Realtime-2: GPT-5-class reasoning in the voice API
OpenAI released GPT-Realtime-2, bringing GPT-5-class reasoning to its low-latency voice API.

pairs._note: both Python ecosystem but unrelated → NOT dup
pairs.a:
Pyodide 0.314 lets you publish WASM wheels to PyPI
Pyodide 0.314 adds support for building and publishing WebAssembly wheels to PyPI.
pairs.b:
Python core devs revert the incremental garbage collector in 3.14 & 3.15
The Python team reverted the incremental GC introduced earlier, citing regressions, in both 3.14 and 3.15.

pairs._note: same GC revert story, reworded → DUP
pairs.a:
Python core devs revert the incremental garbage collector in 3.14 & 3.15
The Python team reverted the incremental GC introduced earlier, citing regressions, in both 3.14 and 3.15.
pairs.b:
CPython rolls back incremental GC for 3.14 and 3.15
Citing performance regressions, CPython maintainers have backed out the incremental garbage collector from the 3.14 and 3.15 lines.
